description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mono:latest Docker image and a single build stage. Include a before_script that runs uname -a, mono --version, msbuild /version, and nuget restore -NonInteractive for all jobs. Add a debug job in the build stage that executes cd TraceRoutePlus && msbuild /p:Configuration=\"Debug\";Platform=\"Any CPU\";OutputPath=\"bin/Debug/\" and publishes the TraceRoutePlus/bin/Debug/ directory as an artifact. Add a release job in the same stage that runs cd TraceRoutePlus && msbuild /p:Configuration=\"Release\";Platform=\"Any CPU\";OutputPath=\"bin/Release/\" and publishes the TraceRoutePlus/bin/Release/ directory as an artifact.
